ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Continued To Jul-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Sheila Robello, Esq., for Barbara Simon, Administrator.

Ms. Robello offers a status of the estate, specifically regarding the pending tax issues, stating that the intention is to file a petition within thirty (30) days. A continuance date is discussed and confirmed.

The subject matter is continued to Jul-28-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
